title: SunSheep's MaceExpand
description:
Many auxiliary enchantments and equipment related to mace
添加了重锤的更多辅助附魔和装备
body:
新增道具:
1.升龙杖·引力控制:
    使用它给重锤带来巨大提升 此物品只有放在副手可使用
    [升龙]:放在副手时 右键使用:引导龙之力飞向高空,cd:6s
    [盘龙]:使用重锤造成的伤害大于6点后将重置[升龙]cd (包括平砍)
2.龙魂
    击败末影龙后获得  可用于合成升龙杖与重锤套·头盔

新增装备:
重锤套:
   1.头盔:
        套装唯一主动:[引力护体]:按下装备技能(默认r)键,获得持续5s的[虚化]效果    cd:30s
        [虚化]:期间抵抗所有伤害,持续反胃直到效果结束,效果结束后回复一定血量并获得加速和跳跃提升
   2.胸甲:
        被动技能:[引灵]:持续对周围生物施加虚弱效果
   3.护腿:
        被动技能:[回甘]:使用重锤造成伤害的5%会作为血量和饱食度反馈给自己
   4.靴子:
        [掌控]:大幅降低摔落伤害
        [反噬]:无法通过附魔台添加附魔

新增附魔:
1.伤害共享：
将造成的伤害溅射给周围生物  每级提高范围和伤害  至多V级
2.龙威:物品[升龙杖·引力控制]专属附魔:
使用[升龙]会禁锢周围生物    每级提高范围和时间  至多V级

新增生物:
精确测试人偶,无ai,攻击后在聊天栏显示精确伤害
人偶需要使用位于工具栏的[人偶卸载器]卸载



English:
New props:
1. Ascending Dragon Staff · Gravity Control:
Using it brings a huge boost to the heavy hammer. This item can only be used by the deputy
[Ascending Dragon]: Right click when placed on the assistant to use: Guide the power of the dragon to fly high into the sky, cd:6s
[Panlong]: When the damage caused by using a heavy hammer is greater than 6 points, the [Ascending Dragon] CD (including flat cuts) will be reset
2. Dragon Soul
After defeating the Shadow Dragon, obtain a helmet that can be used to synthesize the Rising Dragon Staff and Heavy Hammer Set

New equipment:
Heavy hammer sleeve:
1. Helmet:
Unique Active Set: [Gravity Protector]: Press the equipment skill (default r) key to obtain a 5-second [Void] effect cd: 30s
[Void]: Resist all damage during this period, continuously nauseous until the effect ends, restore a certain amount of health and gain acceleration and jumping boost after the effect ends
2. Chest armor:
Passive Skill: [Spiritual Attraction]: Continuously exerts a weakening effect on surrounding creatures
3. Leg guards:
Passive skill: [Return Sweet]: 5% of damage caused by using a heavy hammer will be used as health and satiety feedback to oneself
4. Boots:
[Control]: Significantly reduce fall injuries
[Backfire]: Unable to add enchantments through the enchantment table

New Enchanting:
1. Damage sharing:
Splash the damage caused to surrounding creatures, increasing the range and damage by up to V levels per level
2. Dragon Power: Item [Ascending Dragon Staff · Gravity Control] Exclusive Enchantment:
Using [Ascending Dragon] will imprison surrounding creatures and increase their range and time by up to V levels per level

New Biology:
Accurately test puppet, no AI, display precise damage in chat bar after attack
Dolls need to be uninstalled using the [Doll Uninstaller] located in the toolbar
